title: Small Business Survey - Luke Charters MP for York Outer
meta_description: I am asking businesses in York Outer to complete a short survey so that I can learn more about the issues that you are facing. I am particularly interested in the use of banking and cash services in York Outer and whether the closure of high street banks has had…
text_excerpt: Small Business Survey - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Small Business Survey I am asking businesses in York Outer to complete a short survey so that I can learn more about the issues that you are facing. I am particularly interested in the use of banking and cash services in York Outer and whether the closure of high street banks has had an impact on your business. You would also be welcome to email me ( [email protected] ), if there is a more complex issue that I may be able to help with or if you wish to provide more detail to your survey response. I’m lucky to have so many amazing small businesses in my constituency. However, I know that it is not always easy running a business especially after lockdowns and a cost-of-living crisis. This survey is my opportunity to learn more about your business and hopefully how I can help it. Name of Business Email Address What banking facilities do you currently use? (select all that apply) Free ATMs (cash machines) Paid ATMs (cash machines) Bank branches Post offices Other (please state) If you use a banking branch or post office where is it located? How important are cash payments to your business? Very Important Important Not important Not applicable Other (please state) Are there any challenges that you are you facing due to lack of access to facilities such as banking branches? Do you consent to being contact by the office of Luke Charters MP regarding the contents of this survey Yes No Do you want to hear more from Luke Charters MP regarding local news, events, and campaigns? Yes No Data Processing Permission I agree to Luke Charters MP using the information I have provided and using it to understand what issues are most relevant to me and to contact me about events and other activities. I understand I can opt out from communication at any time.
